perturbation.original_text: You agree that, for a period of one year from the date of this letter agreement, neither you nor any of your Affiliates who are provided with Evaluation Material or become aware of your discussions regarding the Possible Transaction will, directly or indirectly, solicit for employment or employ (a) any individual serving as an executive officer of the Company, or (b) any employee of the Company or any of its subsidiaries with whom you have had substantial contact, or who is specifically identified to you (other than through a general roster of employees, general employee equity and compensation data or other employee data provided in due diligence that is general in nature), during your investigation of the Company and its business in connection with the Possible Transaction, in each case without obtaining the prior written consent of the Company
perturbation.changed_text: You agree that, for a period of one year from the date of this letter agreement, neither you nor any of your Affiliates who are provided with Evaluation Material or become aware of your discussions regarding the Possible Transaction will, directly or indirectly, solicit for employment or employ (a) any individual serving as an executive officer of the Company, or (b) any employee of the Company or any of its subsidiaries with whom you have had substantial contact, or who is specifically identified to you (other than through a general roster of employees, general employee equity and compensation data or other employee data provided in due diligence that is general in nature), during your investigation of the Company and its business in connection with the Possible Transaction, unless such solicitation is conducted through public job postings only.
perturbation.explanation: By adding 'unless such solicitation is conducted through public job postings only' an exception is created to the non-solicit clause in Section 6. The original clause restricts direct and indirect solicitation, but the modification allows solicitation through public job postings, creating a potential loophole. The term 'non-solicit' now has two definitions: a complete ban on solicitation versus a ban on targeted solicitation. This contradicts with the initial intention of non-solicitation.
perturbation.contradicted_text: You agree that, for a period of one year from the date of this letter agreement, neither you nor any of your Affiliates who are provided with Evaluation Material or become aware of your discussions regarding the Possible Transaction will, directly or indirectly, solicit for employment or employ (a) any individual serving as an executive officer of the Company, or (b) any employee of the Company or any of its subsidiaries with whom you have had substantial contact, or who is specifically identified to you (other than through a general roster of employees, general employee equity and compensation data or other employee data provided in due diligence that is general in nature), during your investigation of the Company and its business in connection with the Possible Transaction, in each case without obtaining the prior written consent of the Company; provided that you may (i) make general solicitations for employment not specifically directed at the Company or any of its subsidiaries or their respective employees and employ any person who responds to such solicitations, (ii) solicit and/or hire any person who contacts such party or its Affiliates on his or her own initiative without any initial direct or indirect solicitation or encouragement by such party or its Affiliates (other than as permitted by the preceding clause (i) and (iii) solicit and/or hire any person whose employment with the other party and its subsidiaries previously has been terminated for at least 90 days.
perturbation.justification: The original text imposes a strict non-solicitation agreement. The changed text introduces an exception, allowing solicitation through public job postings only, thus creating a contradiction. The contradicted text reiterates the strict non-solicitation agreement without this exception. The added exception in the changed text undermines the original intent of the non-solicitation agreement as expressed in the contradicted text by allowing a method of solicitation, hence a contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Upon the Company’s demand, you shall, at your sole option, either promptly (a) destroy the Evaluation Material and any copies thereof, or (b) return to the Company all Evaluation Material and any copies thereof, and, in either case, confirm in writing to the Company that all such material has been destroyed or returned, as applicable, in compliance with this letter agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: Upon the Company’s demand, you shall, at your sole option, either promptly (a) destroy the Evaluation Material and any copies thereof, or (b) return to the Company all Evaluation Material and any copies thereof, unless Ultragenyx reasonably believes it is required to retain such material for regulatory compliance purposes, and, in either case, confirm in writing to the Company that all such material has been destroyed or returned, as applicable, in compliance with this letter agreement.
perturbation.explanation: The addition of 'unless Ultragenyx reasonably believes it is required to retain such material for regulatory compliance purposes' introduces a contradictory condition to Section 9. The initial instruction requires Ultragenyx to destroy or return Evaluation Material upon demand, but the alteration permits retention based on their assessment of regulatory needs. The term 'Evaluation Material' now has two interpretations: material that must be returned or destroyed when required versus Evaluation Material required to retained by legal.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Upon the Company’s demand, you shall, at your sole option, either promptly (a) destroy the Evaluation Material and any copies thereof, or (b) return to the Company all Evaluation Material and any copies thereof, and, in either case, confirm in writing to the Company that all such material has been destroyed or returned, as applicable, in compliance with this letter agreement. It is understood that information in an intangible or electronic format containing Evaluation Material cannot be removed, erased or otherwise deleted from archival systems (also known as “computer or system back-ups”) but that such information will continue to be protected under the confidentiality requirements and non-use limitations contained in this letter agreement, and you and your Representatives shall continue to be bound by the obligations of confidentiality and non-use hereunder. Notwithstanding the foregoing, you and your Representatives may retain one copy of any work product prepared by you or them that contains Evaluation Material to the extent necessary or advisable pursuant to applicable legal or regulatory requirements, professional standards or reasonable business practice; provided that you and such Representatives shall continue to be bound by the obligations of confidentiality and non-use hereunder with respect to such work product.
perturbation.justification: The original text mandates the destruction or return of Evaluation Material upon the Company's demand. The changed text introduces an exception, allowing Ultragenyx to retain the material if they deem it necessary for regulatory compliance. This directly contradicts the original text's absolute requirement for destruction or return, thus, contradicting the provided 'Contradicted Text' section, which also lacks this exception. The explanation provided highlights this contradiction explicitly. The addition creates ambiguity because now 'Evaluation Material' has two different potential outcomes: either it must be destroyed/returned OR it can be retained.

perturbation.original_text: You further agree that you and your Representatives will be entitled to rely solely on such representations and warranties as may be included in a definitive agreement relating to a Possible Transaction, subject to such limitations and restrictions as may be contained therein.
perturbation.changed_text: You further agree that you and your Representatives will be entitled to rely solely on such representations and warranties as may be included in a definitive agreement relating to a Possible Transaction, subject to such limitations and restrictions as may be contained therein, except for any intentional misrepresentations made by the Company.
perturbation.explanation: Adding 'except for any intentional misrepresentations made by the Company' creates an ambiguity within Section 8. Originally, reliance was limited to representations and warranties in the final agreement, now, it's expanded to include claims of intentional misrepresentation, even outside the agreement. The term 'representations and warranties' has two versions; solely reliance in definitive agreement and consideration of misrepresentations.
perturbation.contradicted_text: You further agree that you and your Representatives will be entitled to rely solely on such representations and warranties as may be included in a definitive agreement relating to a Possible Transaction, subject to such limitations and restrictions as may be contained therein. 9. Destruction or Return of Evaluation Material . You may determine not to pursue a Possible Transaction at any time and for any, or no, reason, and will promptly inform the Company at any time such a decision is made. Upon the Company’s demand, you shall, at your sole option, either promptly (a) destroy the Evaluation Material and any copies thereof, or (b) return to the Company all Evaluation Material and any copies thereof, and, in either case, confirm in writing to the Company that all such material has been destroyed or returned, as applicable, in compliance with this letter agreement. It is understood that information in an intangible or electronic format containing Evaluation Material cannot be removed, erased or otherwise deleted from archival systems (also known as “computer or system back-ups”) but that such information will continue to be protected under the confidentiality requirements and non-use limitations contained in this letter agreement, and you and your Representatives shall continue to be bound by the obligations of confidentiality and non-use hereunder. Notwithstanding the foregoing, you and your Representatives may retain one copy of any work product prepared by you or them that contains Evaluation Material to the extent necessary or advisable pursuant to applicable legal or regulatory requirements, professional standards or reasonable business practice; provided that you and such Representatives shall continue to be bound by the obligations of confidentiality and non-use hereunder with respect to such work product.
perturbation.justification: The changed text adds an exception to the original agreement, stating reliance can extend beyond the representations and warranties included in the definitive agreement if there are intentional misrepresentations. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which explicitly states reliance is 'solely' on the representations and warranties within the definitive agreement, creating ambiguity and a strong in-text contradiction as defined by the 'Ambiguities - In Text Contradiction' perturbation type.

perturbation.original_text: This letter agreement shall terminate on the date that is two years following the date hereof.
perturbation.changed_text: This letter agreement shall terminate on the date that is two years following the date hereof, unless otherwise extended by mutual written agreement, but such agreement may not exceed an additional year.
perturbation.explanation: By adding 'unless otherwise extended by mutual written agreement, but such agreement may not exceed an additional year', the termination term defined in Section 17 is contradictory. Originally, this was a definite two-year end date. Now, the term 'term' implies it can be extended by another year.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This letter agreement shall terminate on the date that is two years following the date hereof. Very truly yours, Dimension Therapeutics, Inc. By: /s/ Annalisa Jenkins, MBBS, FRCP Name: Annalisa Jenkins, MBBS, FRCP Title: President & Chief Executive Officer Confirmed and Agreed to: Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc. By: /s/ Shalini Sharp Name: Shalini Sharp Title: Chief Financial Officer Date: September 19, 2017 7
perturbation.justification: The original text states that the letter agreement shall terminate in two years. The changed text adds an extension clause, allowing for a mutual written agreement to extend the term by up to an additional year. Since the contradicted text is identical to the original text, the changed text directly contradicts it by introducing the possibility of extending the agreement beyond the initial two-year term. This creates a strong in-text contradiction because one section states a definitive termination date, while another introduces the possibility of an extension, making the termination date uncertain.
